title: RaveDAO (RAVE) Surges 47% to $27.26, Climbs to #19 Market Cap Ranking
excerpt: RaveDAO has experienced a remarkable 47.73% price surge in the past 24 hours, pushing the token to $27.26 and securing its position as the 19th largest cryptocurrency by market capitalization. This explosive growth highlights the increasing momentum behind decentralized autonomous organization tokens in the current market cycle.
